arts.ttl: How Paris Saint-Germain could win Ligue 1 title this weekend as unbeaten record looms
arts.sum: Sports Mole explains how Paris Saint-Germain could wrap up the Ligue 1 title with six games left to play this weekend.

arts.ttl: PSG want to go unbeaten to title - Luis Enrique
arts.sum: A fourth straight Ligue 1 title is just a draw away as Paris St Germain host Angers on Saturday, and coach Luis Enrique, who has found motivation pursuing higher goals, is relishing the prospect of becoming the first to finish the league unbeaten.

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 28: PSG look to wrap up title against Angers
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 28 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…

PSG are on the cusp of being crowned Ligue 1 champions and need only to avoid defeat to secure another title. Unbeaten at home in the league this season, they should feel confident about earning anoth...

arts.sum: Last month, Ousmane Dembele, who has been in top form since the start of 2025, stirred up speculation by changing his Instagram profile picture to an old photo of himself and Gavi from their time together in Barcelona. arts.ttl: Juventus’ Loan Plan for €60M-Rated PSG Flop in Doubt Amid Arsenal, Newcastle Interest
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani has made an immediate impact at Juventus, contributing seven goals in 11 appearances since joining on loan from Paris Saint-Germain during the winter transfer window.
